description: Load Moirai config context at session start

hooks.prompt: Check if `.moirai/config.json` exists in the project root. If it exists, read it and briefly inform the user that this project has Moirai configured with the following commands: `/moirai:plan` (start planning), `/moirai:implement <issue-number>` (implement a planned PRD), `/moirai:verify [issue-number]` (verify completed work). If the file does not exist, do nothing.
